content_en:
hyena meat is halaal to eat. In warning us about relying solely on logic to comprehend the deen Ali (ra) said: “This Deen is not by logic. If this religion were based on logic, it would be more reasonable to wipe under the socks when we make mas’hu, rather than the upper. But I have seen the Messenger of Allah 225 wiping over the upper part of his socks, when he was making mas’hu.”

It is worthy of mentioning that the wine in Paradise is different from the wine of the dunya; in that the wine of Paradise cannot make you drunk regardless of the amount you drink as opposed to the wine of this world. Also the Holy

Prophet 2% said: “Anyone who drinks the wine of this world will have no salah for forty days and forty nights”.”

We should all use our intellect to appreciate the wonderful and marvellous creation of Allah 2, and all His favours that He has bestowed upon us. By doing so we will become more appreciative of Allah 3 and consequently submit to Him wholeheartedly. Hence Allah 3% said:

cpa tll GLE 89 KE gy tS (li Ib 85 Las

“Verily! In the creation of the Heavens and Earth, and in the alteration of night and day, there are indeed signs for men of understanding. Those who remember Allah (always

”4 Sunan Abu Dawud (English trans.) Vol. 1, p. 40, No. 162. ”5 Musnad Ahmad Vol. 2, p. 35.

An illegitimate child cannot enter the Paradise nor anyone from his descendants to as far as the seventh generation.

Related by At Tabaraani and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

This fabricated Hadith contradicts the Holy Qur’an. Allah 3% said in this regard:

“No soul shall be made to bear the burden of another (ie. sins).”””

76 Surah Al-Invaan 3:190-191 7 Surah Najm 53:38.

Sesh bal 5g 44

“And if one heavily laden with burden (i.e. sins) calls another to bear his load, nothing of it will be lifted even though he will be near of kin...””*

An illegitimate child had no choice whether to be legitimate or illegitimate. The blame lies totally with his or her parents. To insinuate that Allah 2 will punish an illegitimate child due to the sin of the parents is unislamic and illogical. Allah 3% is not an oppressor and hence He 5 doesn’t punish a person for the sin of another.

It is the natural right of every child to be bom legitimate. As for the hadith that says the illegitimate child should not lead the salah, this hadith is classified weak. The Imam which the Muslims are not supposed to pray behind is the one who is an open sinner, or the one with a deviant Aqeedah which contains shirk e.g. the Berailwis, the Shias (Twelvers), Democrats etc.

There is no Athaan nor iqaamah for women and no Ghus]l for Salatul Jumu’ah.

Related by Ibn Adee and classified fabricated by Ahmad Ibn Hanbal.

Men and women are equal in regards to rewards and

*8 Surah Faatir 35:18.

punishments. Hence when we are commanded by Allah 3% to do something it also includes women, e.g. Shahadah, Salah, Zakah, Saum and Hajj. Because women are included in the commandments, which are inside the Qur’an and Hadith, there is no sin on them if they recite the Athaan and Iqaamah for prayer. This permission is only granted to them when they are in a building where there are no men around. It’s unislamic for women to call the Athaan when there are men around because a woman’s voice becomes her Aura when it is beautified.

As for the part of the hadith that says there is no ghusl for women before Salatul Jumu’ah, it contradicts the Islamic Shariah because it is Sunnah Muakkadah on those who attend Jumu’ah Salah to perform Ghusl whether they are men or women. It is compulsory on men to perform Jumu’ah but optional for women. I would recommend for women who are living in non-Muslim countries like Europe, America and the Caribbean to perform Jumu’ah as often as possible because it causes them to grow in Iman (faith). Hence they should attend a mosque where the khutba is delivered in a language that they understand. It is not compulsory for the khutba to be in Arabic. This is an erroneous concept. The purpose of a khutba is to remind the believers of their duties to Allah3%; so if it is delivered in a language that they don’t understand they will not gain any benefit from it.

There isn’t a Prophet that was sent except after reaching the age of forty.

Classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

Even though the Holy Prophet Muhammad 33 became a Prophet at the age of forty, we should not entertain the idea that that was the case with all the previous Prophets. Isa “3 became a Prophet at the young age of thirty. He was taken up to heaven at the age of thirty-three. Hence his mission lasted for three years three months and three days.

Allah will not Punish (His servants) over an issue in which there was a difference of opinion concerning it.

Classified fabricated by Sakhaawi. Even though the Muslims differ about Music, Allah

promised a painful punishment for those who engage in it in Surah Luqman verse 6.

Bury your dead in the graveyards of the pious people, for verily the dead is hurt by a had

” See tafser Ibn Katheer for the explanation of Surah Lugman verse 6. The music which is condemned in this ayah is wind and string instruments.or lyrics of shirk and lewedness.

neighbour the same manner in which a living person suffers from a bad neighbour.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

Even though this hadith is fabricated one should not entertain the idea that he or she can bury the deceased Muslims wherever they like. The deceased Muslims should only be buried in the graveyard of the Muslims. As for the practice of transporting the dead bodies of the Muslims from Europe to Africa or even from the USA to Asia to be buried, this is unnecessary hassle and should be avoided. If the dead person requested that his body should be transported to far places to be buried, such as from England to Pakistan, his relatives do not have to fulfil that request because he is being awkward and difficult.

I begged my Lord (Glorified be He) not to send any member of my household to the Hellfire and He granted me my request.

Related by Ibn Bushraan and classified fabricated by Nisaaee.

This fabricated hadith is in conflict with the Islamic aqeedah and many authentic traditions of the Holy Prophet Muhammad 2. For example, Abu Huraira (ra) narrated when Allah SS revealed the verse :

“And warn your tribe O Muhammad and near kindred.” He the Prophet = gathered the people at Safa and said to them: “O people of Quraish, buy yourselves from Allah, I cannot avail you at all against Allah, O sons of Abdul Muttalib, I cannot avail you at all against Allah, O Abbaas Ibn Abdul Muttalib, I cannot avail you at all against Allah, O Safiya (Aunt of the Messenger of Allah) I cannot avail you at all against Allah, O Fatima (daughter of Muhammad) ask me whatever you like but I cannot avail you at all against Allah,”

This hadith states that mere relationship with the Holy Prophet 3 will not absolve anyone of his or her sins. Every Muslim has to fear Allah S& and strive in His path with tighteous deeds if they want to be in Paradise. As for depending upon blood ties and high lineage to be in Paradise, this will not be the case because even the nearest of the Prophet’s kin would be treated by Allah 3 on the same level as other people, and they would be held accountable for their deeds like the rest of humanity.

He who invited someone to Islam causing him or her to embrace it, then he, the caller, shall surely enter the Paradise.

Related by Tayyibee and classified fabricated by As-Saghaani.

There is no doubt that to give someone his or her shahadah is a great blessing and reward for the Daa’ee. However not every Daa’ee is on the right aqeedah, hence some people embrace Islam from movements like the Nation of Islam, Qadiyaanis, Berailwis, extremist Sufis, grave worshippers, Shias etc. The above-mentioned deviants are not inside the fold of Islam so how can they be accepted into the Paradise. They are all guilty of major shirk and Allah 3% said about the people who commit major shirk.

“And indeed it has been revealed to you Oh Muhammad as it was was to those before you. If you join others in worship with Allah then surely all your deeds will be in vain and you will certainly be among the losers. ”*!

The only group of Shias that are still inside the fold of Islam are the Zaidis. As for the other groups they are not to be considered Muslims because they make takfeer on the Sahaabahs, they claim the Qur’an has been changed and they claim that the sun, moon and stars are subservient to their imams and that the imams know when they are going to die and they choose when to die. Thus they reject faith in Surah Luqman 31:34 because Allah 3% stated that no one knows when they will die.

He who plays chess is cursed. Classified fabricated by Imam Nawawi.
content_id:
Daging hyena adalah halal untuk dimakan. Dalam memperingatkan kita tentang bahaya mengandalkan logika semata untuk memahami agama, Ali (ra) berkata: "Agama ini bukan berdasarkan logika. Jika agama ini didasarkan pada logika, tentu lebih masuk akal untuk mengusap bagian bawah kaus kaki ketika melakukan mashu daripada bagian atasnya. Namun aku telah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ mengusap bagian atas kaus kakinya ketika melakukan mashu."

Patut disebutkan bahwa anggur dalam surga berbeda dari anggur dunia; anggur surga tidak membuat mabuk berapa pun yang diminum, berbeda dengan anggur dunia ini. Nabi ﷺ juga bersabda: "Barangsiapa meminum anggur dunia ini, salatnya tidak akan diterima selama empat puluh hari empat puluh malam."

Kita semua harus menggunakan akal kita untuk mengagumi ciptaan Allah ﷻ yang indah dan luar biasa serta segala nikmat yang dilimpahkan kepada kita. Dengan demikian kita akan semakin bersyukur kepada Allah ﷻ dan akibatnya menyerahkan diri kepada-Nya sepenuh hati. Maka Allah ﷻ berfirman: "Sesungguhnya dalam penciptaan langit dan bumi dan pergantian malam dan siang, terdapat tanda-tanda bagi orang-orang yang berakal. Yaitu orang-orang yang senantiasa mengingat Allah ﷻ..."

Anak yang lahir dari hubungan zina tidak dapat masuk surga dan tidak pula siapa pun dari keturunannya hingga generasi ketujuh.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ath-Thabarani dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Jawzi.

Hadis palsu ini bertentangan dengan Al-Quran. Allah ﷻ berfirman: "Dan orang yang berdosa tidak akan memikul dosa orang lain." Dan: "Jika seseorang yang berat dosanya memanggil orang lain untuk memikul dosanya, tiadalah akan dipikulkan untuknya sedikit pun meskipun yang dipanggilnya itu kaum kerabatnya."

Seorang anak yang lahir dari hubungan zina tidak memiliki pilihan dalam hal ini. Kesalahan sepenuhnya ada pada orang tuanya. Allah ﷻ tidak menghukum seseorang karena dosa orang lain.

Tidak ada azan maupun iqamah untuk wanita.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Adiy dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal.

Laki-laki dan perempuan setara dalam hal pahala dan hukuman dari Allah ﷻ.

Bermain catur adalah haram.

As-Sakhawi berpendapat bahwa tidak ada hadis autentik yang melarang permainan catur. Mayoritas ulama berpendapat bahwa permainan backgammon (nard) adalah haram karena banyak tradisi autentik yang melarangnya. Abu Musa Al-Asy'ari meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa bermain backgammon maka ia mendurhakai Allah ﷻ dan Rasul-Nya."

Para ulama yang membolehkan permainan catur menetapkan tiga pedoman: 1. Salat tidak boleh ditunda dari waktunya yang ditentukan. 2. Tidak boleh ada perjudian yang terlibat. 3. Para pemain tidak boleh marah atau menggunakan kata-kata kotor.

Adapun permainan meja lainnya seperti dam, scrabble, monopoli, domino, semuanya diperbolehkan karena dalam syariat Islam segala sesuatu adalah halal sampai terbukti haram, dan tidak ada dalil bahwa permainan-permainan ini haram.

Seandainya aku bersumpah demi Allah ﷻ dan berdusta, itu lebih aku sukai daripada bersumpah selain Allah ﷻ dan berbicara jujur.

Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Nu'aym dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ad-Daruquthni.

Barangsiapa bersumpah demi Allah ﷻ bahwa ia tidak akan melakukan sesuatu kemudian melanggar sumpahnya dengan melakukannya harus membayar kafarat kepada Allah ﷻ dengan membebaskan seorang budak, atau memberi makan sepuluh orang miskin, atau memberi mereka pakaian, atau berpuasa tiga hari jika tidak mampu melakukan ketiga pilihan sebelumnya.

Imam Bukhari berkata: "Seorang lelaki dari pedalaman datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: Wahai Rasulullah! Apakah dosa-dosa besar itu? Beliau menjawab: Menyekutukan Allah ﷻ Yang Mahatinggi. Lelaki itu bertanya: Lalu apa setelah itu? Nabi ﷺ menjawab: Sumpah palsu. Aku bertanya: Apakah sumpah palsu itu? Beliau bersabda: Yaitu yang merampas harta seorang Muslim, yakni bersumpah saat berdusta untuk merampok sesama Muslim."

Sesungguhnya para Malaikat berkata kepada Allah ﷻ: "Ya Tuhan, bagaimana Engkau bersabar terhadap banyaknya dosa-dosa Bani Adam?" Dia berfirman: "Aku menguji mereka kemudian mengampuni mereka atas dosa-dosa mereka." Para Malaikat berkata: "Seandainya kami berada di tempat mereka, kami tidak akan mendurhakai-Mu." Dia berfirman: "Maka pilihlah dua malaikat dari antara kalian untuk berada di tempat mereka." Maka mereka memilih Harut dan Marut; dan keduanya turun ke bumi...

Ini adalah kisah Harut dan Marut yang disebutkan dalam Al-Quran (Surah Al-Baqarah: 102). Para ulama berbeda pendapat tentang interpretasi dan riwayat-riwayat yang berkaitan dengan kisah ini. Banyak riwayat yang dianggap lemah atau palsu oleh para ulama hadis. Yang pasti adalah Al-Quran menyebutkan mereka sebagai dua malaikat yang diturunkan di Babilonia yang mengajarkan sihir kepada manusia sebagai ujian.
